# The Eden Institute

> Biblical clinical herbalism education. Constitutional, terrain-based herbal medicine anchored in Scripture.

The Eden Institute trains students in constitutional and energetics-based herbalism — reading the body's tissue states (temperature, fluid, tone) and matching plants according to design rather than treating symptoms. Curriculum is structured in three tiers; Tier 1 (Biblical Framework) is live, Tier 2 (Body Systems & Clinical Literacy) is on waitlist, Tier 3 (Terrain-Based Clinical Herbalism) ships in 2027.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the Institute, free constitutional quiz, and program ladder.
- [Why Eden](/why-eden): Long-form manifesto on terrain-based, Scripture-anchored herbalism.
- [Constitutional Herbalism](/constitutional-herbalism): Primer on the six tissue states and three-axis constitutional framework.
- [Courses](/courses): Tier 1 Foundations course, pricing, and curriculum overview.
- [App](/app): Eden Apothecary — terrain-based clinical decision-support web app (launching July 7, 2026).
- [Homeschool](/homeschool): Eden's Table homeschool herbalism curriculum.
- [Community](/community): The Rooted Community — local fellowship and study groups.
- [Tier 2 Waitlist](/tier-2-waitlist): Free waitlist for Body Systems & Clinical Literacy.
- [Constitutional Quiz](/assessment): Free 2-minute quiz to identify your constitutional pattern.
